message:
hygiene: unexport 5 dead symbols in internal/merge

Unexported IsTombstone, IsExpiredTombstone, Merge3WayWithTTL, IssueKey
(all only used within the package). Removed dead Comment type alias
(never referenced). merge.Merge3Way and merge.Issue remain exported.

Closes dolt-test-ng9
